MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-24-2011 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-23-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha. Not reported.
Appearances:
Jeff Woo, Esq. for Plaintiff Tommy Loo.
Adam Trigg, Esq. representing the Defendant Manuel Rosa through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem: David Yang, litigant(s) and counsel confer privately in Room 502-A,
for settlement discussions.

Case settled, Trial Date vacated.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Requests For Production From Manuel Rosa
Off Calendar Jan-04-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. HARRISON NAM OF COOPER, WHITE & COOPER, TEL. NO. 433-1900 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
MANUEL ROSA, TEL. NO. 321-0338, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF TOMMY LOO'S Motion To Compel Responses To Requests For Production (From Manuel Rosa) is Granted without objections by January 6, 2011, no opposition was filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported. = (301/PJB)

MINI MINUTES:

RULING - THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. PLAINTIFF TOMMY LOO'S Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories (General From Manuel Rosa) IS Granted and to be provided by the end of the day on Thursday January 6, 2011. No opposition was filed. THE COURT AWARDED $690.00 IN SANCTIONS TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported. = (301/PJB)
